<a style = "float:right; margin-right: -100px; margin-bottom: 100px; margin-top:-25px;" class="btn btn-primary mb-5 rnd-corners" href="">Go to Device Management</a>

<div class="center-div">
# Patients with Device Requested
</div>
<br>
<table class="table table-striped mt-1" id="patientTable" style="margin-left:-120px;">
  <thead>
        <tr>
            <th class="td-patient">Name</th>
            <th class="td-patient">Room</th>
            <th class="td-patient">Risk Score</th>
            <th class="td-patient">Notes</th>
            <th class="td-patient-options">Options </th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td class="td-patient" style ="margin-top:10px;">Jane Smith</td>
            <td class="td-patient">4401</td>
            <td class="td-patient">High (5)</td>
            <td class="td-patient">C on XYZ medication, high Schmidt Score</td>
            <td class="td-patient">
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: RoyalBlue; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Allocate Device
                </button>
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: MediumSeaGreen; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Waitlist Patient
                </button>
                <button
                    class=" btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: Crimson; color: white; margin-top:5px"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Remove Device
                </button>
            </td>
             <tr>
            <td class="td-patient">John Doe</td>
            <td class="td-patient">3053</td>
            <td class="td-patient">Medium (3)</td>
            <td class="td-patient">Can become Highly Agitated, Sun-Downer</td>
            <td class="td-patient">
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: RoyalBlue; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Allocate Device
                </button>
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: MediumSeaGreen; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Waitlist Patient
                </button>
                <button
                    class=" btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: Crimson; color: white; margin-top:5px"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Remove Device
                </button>
            </td>
        </tr>
         <tr>
            <td class="td-patient">Luke Johnson</td>
            <td class="td-patient">2033</td>
            <td class="td-patient">Low (1)</td>
            <td class="td-patient">Occasional episodes, low schmidt score</td>
            <td class="td-patient">
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: RoyalBlue; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Allocate Device
                </button>
                <button
                    class="col btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: MediumSeaGreen; color: white;"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Waitlist Patient
                </button>
                <button
                    class=" btn btn-sm rnd-corners"
                    style="background-color: Crimson; color: white; margin-top:5px"
                    href="/Request.html">
                 Remove Device
                </button>
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>

</div>
</br>
